Synthetic hand-checked fixture for the PRA UK CRR SBM comparison profile.

This fixture exercises `GIRR` `VEGA` under `PRA_UK_CRR` using
PRA PS1/26 Appendix 1 / PRA2026/1 profile-owned citation ids. It is comparison-profile
material only and is not final regulatory capital.

Exercises GIRR vega option-tenor weighting under the PRA UK CRR comparison profile.
